ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(!$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, IF(NOT(ISNULL( leaseworks__Second_Fee_Period_Start_Date__c )), leaseworks__Second_Fee_Period_Start_Date__c > ADDMONTHS( leaseworks__Fee_Start_Date__c ,IF(ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Frequency__c , 'Monthly'),1,IF(ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Frequency__c, 'Quarterly'),3,IF(ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Frequency__c, 'Half-Yearly'),6,IF(ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Frequency__c, 'Annual'),12,1))))),false))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The difference between the Fee Start Date and Second Fee Period Start Date is longer than the frequency selected
